title: PREPARE: limit statement not recognised
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, value REAL CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, NULL), (3, 5.0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 10;
key_bug_features: limit statement with parameterized query not recognized
